meaning: n.学会,学院,协会vt.创立,开始,制定,开始(调查),提起(诉讼)
examples: Mr. Lin is associate director of the Institute.
He got a scholarship to the Pratt Institute of Art.
He visited the Institute of Neurology in Havana where they both worked.
Here, the campus of the Massachusetts Institute for Technology is recognizable by its classical architecture.
Enter Ronald Fox and friends over at the National Institute of Standards and Technology.
